note: This registry is inert governance data only. It defines stable side-effect class IDs and descriptions only. It does not enable execution, approve anything, or change compiler, runtime, or CLI behavior.

classes.description: No side effect. Safe no-op classification only.
Read from committed local fixture data only, with no external access.
Read data from an external system or service boundary.
Write or mutate data in an external system or service boundary.
External read that requires credentials or brokered identity material.
External write that requires credentials or brokered identity material.
Outbound network communication or remote procedure access.
Human review or approval gate requirement, without implying automated approval.
